name: Arb Corporation Limited.
analysis: ARB has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 51% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$19.6100, stop A$17.8299, target A$21.8285 (1.25:1) — then trail it.
